column1: # OWASP ZAP baseline alert tuning for h0-archon.vercel.app
# Default for any rule not listed is WARN (advisory). Add IGNORE entries only
# for alerts confirmed non-actionable for this static, ephemeral demo.
# Permissions-Policy, HSTS) are set in next.config.mjs headers(); the related
# ZAP rules are intentionally LEFT AT WARN so any regression surfaces.

column3: Timestamp Disclosure - numeric ids/build hashes in the bundle, not secrets
Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments in framework/vendor JS bundles
Modern Web Application - expected for a Next.js SPA-style app
